en: Api, are you home?
Yes, come on in.
Api, are you home?

ab: kadrwa yakai daane ko Lavaoso! konako ka Molisi, la yakai ka manema ka atomana? lo mobaliyonga ko Lavaoso naelaelanga.
ch: B:Lavaoso不在家耶!我是Molisi，有什麼事嗎? 回來我會轉告Lavaoso。
en: Api is not at home. I am Ipay. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.
Who are you?

ab: amaninai Sele’e si Lavaoso, moleba naiya!
en: Grandma, we are Abas and Api, please open the door for us.
Who is it?

ab: amaniyako ka Tinebenga, wakela ko sila’e ki ’Adraliyo.
en: I am Buya, I am here for Utay.
Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: mawlainga so kadro kelakela, mabarengerako mosowa.
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.

ab: Lavaoso, wakela ko sila’e mosowa, ilata mwa kivaevang.
en: Api, I am here to play with you.
Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看!
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!
The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: niyama! ’odroliyali kaivai akanea ka madro, kanea ’alalava!
ch: A:過來!這是我種的水果，吃看看。
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.
The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: twakainena! ’odrolili kaivai ngodrangodro kadro ’ohilriyo kanea alalava!
ch: A:請坐! 這是我種的有機玉米吃看看!
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.
Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.
Do you want some oranges?

ab: nako makakane ki tiyanese, nakane ki pingko sikatha.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.

ab: ai kane so kai sinbi kai pingkang?
en: Would you want some cookies?
Sure, I like it very much.

ab: na mongico ki madro si akane mosowa.
en: Let me peel the fruit for you.

ab: maelanenga, siyacilay kai akanea ka madro.
en: Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.
I will bring you some water.
Thank you.

ab: angikalrata kwane, makalra kai wagali ka airo’a.
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ch: B:嗚! 真的很香也好吃。
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.
Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.
I’ll make myself at home then.
Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ch: B:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
